languages.text: Вместе с протекторатом фон Валанциус был уничтожен и 32-ой меровский полк. Рожденные на Заркове люди, вернувшиеся из безвестности на службу Вольному Торговцу, приняли гибель так же, как привыкли жить — с высоко поднятыми головами и с оружием в руках.

The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.
languages.original_text: Вместе с протекторатом фон Валанциус был уничтожен и 32-ой меровский полк. Рожденные на Заркове люди, вернувшиеся из безвестности на службу Вольному Торговцу, приняли гибель так же, как привыкли жить — с высоко поднятыми головами и с оружием в руках.

traits.locale_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

languages.text: 32番メロー連隊はフォン・ヴァランシウス保護領と共に壊滅した。影から戻ってならず商人に仕えたザルコビアンたちは、誇り高く武器を手にしたまま、その生涯を歩んだように、死を迎えた。
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: 32番メロー連隊はフォン・ヴァランシウス保護領と共に壊滅した。影から戻ってならず商人に仕えたザルコビアンたちは、誇り高く武器を手にしたまま、その生涯を歩んだように、死を迎えた。

languages.text: 梅罗夫第32团连同冯·瓦兰修斯属地一起被毁。那些回归行商浪人麾下，不再沉寂的扎尔科夫人死时个个高昂着头颅，紧握着武器，一如他们生前。
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: 梅罗夫第32团连同冯·瓦兰修斯属地一起被毁。那些回归行商浪人麾下，不再沉寂的扎尔科夫人死时个个高昂着头颅，紧握着武器，一如他们生前。

languages.text: Le 32e régiment de Merov fut décimé avec le protectorat von Valancius. Les Zarkoviens, qui étaient sortis de l'obscurité pour servir {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}, firent face à la mort comme ils avaient mené leur vie : la tête haute et l'arme à la main.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: Le 32e régiment de Merov fut décimé avec le protectorat von Valancius. Les Zarkoviens, qui étaient sortis de l'obscurité pour servir {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}, firent face à la mort comme ils avaient mené leur vie : la tête haute et l'arme à la main.

languages.text: El 32.º regimiento de Merov fue destruido junto con el protectorado von Valancius. Los zarkovianos, que habían vuelto de su confinamiento para servir a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, recibieron su muerte igual que vivieron su vida: con la cabeza bien alta y las armas en la mano.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: El 32.º regimiento de Merov fue destruido junto con el protectorado von Valancius. Los zarkovianos, que habían vuelto de su confinamiento para servir a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, recibieron su muerte igual que vivieron su vida: con la cabeza bien alta y las armas en la mano.

languages.text: 32. Merov Alayı, von Valancius protektorasıyla birlikte yok edildi. Hür Tacir'e hizmet etmek için bilinmezlikten dönen Zarkovlular, hayatlarını yaşadıkları gibi, yani başları dik ve ellerinde silahlarla ölümü karşıladı.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: 32. Merov Alayı, von Valancius protektorasıyla birlikte yok edildi. Hür Tacir'e hizmet etmek için bilinmezlikten dönen Zarkovlular, hayatlarını yaşadıkları gibi, yani başları dik ve ellerinde silahlarla ölümü karşıladı.

languages.text: Das 32. Merov-Regiment wurde mit dem Protektorat derer von Valancius zerstört. Die Zarkovianer, die aus der Dunkelheit zurückgekehrt waren, um {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} zu dienen, starben, da sie ihr Leben gelebt hatten ... erhobenen Hauptes und mit gezogener Waffe.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment was destroyed along with the von Valancius protectorate. The Zarkovians, who had returned from obscurity to serve the Rogue Trader, met their deaths as they had lived their lives — with their heads held high and weapons in their hands.

traits.locale_text: Das 32. Merov-Regiment wurde mit dem Protektorat derer von Valancius zerstört. Die Zarkovianer, die aus der Dunkelheit zurückgekehrt waren, um {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} zu dienen, starben, da sie ihr Leben gelebt hatten ... erhobenen Hauptes und mit gezogener Waffe.
